items.title: How The Travelers Companies (TRV) Uses Free Cash Flow to Drive Growth and Payouts
items.description: Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TRV) is included among the 10 Cash-Rich Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TRV) is a US insurer that sells property and casualty insurance to individuals and companies. In the second quarter of 2025, the firm had core income of $1.5 billion ($6.51 per share) and a core return […]

items.title: ValuEngine Weekly Market Summary And Commentary
items.description: Markets are closing out September stronger than its reputation would suggest, with gains across most major equity indexes and sector ETFs. Gold continued to shine as a hedge. Read more here.
